title: Gingerbread Cake
ingredients: ½ tsp nutmeg, cloves, and baking powder
instructions: Add sugar, molasses, and melted butter to the eggs.
Mix and sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and baking powder) together.
Add the dry ingredient mixture to the wet ingredients.
Add boiling water to the batter.
Pour the batter into a lightly greased 13x9 inch pan.
Bake at 350 degrees F for 40 minutes.
Serve warm with fresh, lightly sweetened whipped cream.
notes: Grandparents like to eat this cake with applesauce and a mug of hot cocoa
